conflict: A poor client is about to be buried in damage fees for an injury CommonFrame will not acknowledge, and Mira knows official review will only make the debt more permanent.
consequence: Mira commits her first illegal repair and creates a working alliance with Tavi outside the claims system.
must_land_beats: Show how claims language converts bodily anomaly into debt.
Give the poor client's economic reality enough weight that Mira's choice feels necessary rather than heroic.
Introduce Tavi as funny, competent, and suspicious of anyone still drawing a corporate wage.
End with Mira stepping across the legal line into black-market work.
pressure_source: A poor client is about to be buried in damage fees for an injury CommonFrame will not acknowledge, and Mira knows official review will only make the debt more permanent.
state_shift: Mira commits her first illegal repair and creates a working alliance with Tavi outside the claims system.
